risk_if_not_implemented: Without Inability to Return to Primary Site, residual security, compliance, or resilience risk may accumulate, potentially leading to control failures or non-compliance.

compensating_control_1.name: Alternate Storage Site
compensating_control_1.description: Mechanisms exist to establish an alternate storage site that includes both the assets and necessary agreements to permit the storage and recovery of system backup information.
compensating_control_1.justification: Alternate Storage Site (BCD-08) provides resilience and recovery capability that compensates for the absence of Inability to Return to Primary Site (BCD-09.5) by ensuring the organization can restore operations and data when the primary control is absent. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: Alternate Processing Site
compensating_control_2.description: Mechanisms exist to establish an alternate processing site that provides security measures equivalent to that of the primary site.
compensating_control_2.justification: Alternate Processing Site (BCD-09) provides resilience and recovery capability that compensates for the absence of Inability to Return to Primary Site (BCD-09.5) by ensuring the organization can restore operations and data when the primary control is absent. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
